question: Which players have recorded a regular-season quadruple-double (PTS, REB, AST, BLK all >= 10) since 1954?
notes: PLAN §12 row 17. Canonical PTS/REB/AST/BLK quad-double definition (min_stat=10) returns two games in this warehouse. Alvin Robertson's 1986-02-18 quad-double uses STL instead of BLK and is not included by this strict definition. Olajuwon's famous 1990-03-10 line is not in this warehouse's box (likely a gaps in the historical backfill).
